zh.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville I是Osmund de Stuteville的兒子，於大約1120年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁伯頓 阿格尼斯。他於大約1154年與Agnes在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1170年被列為sheriff of northumberland。他去世於1202年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville I是Osmund de Stuteville的儿子，于大约1120年出生在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁伯頓 阿格尼斯。他于大约1154年与Agnes在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1170年被列为sheriff of northumberland。他去世于1202年在英国英格兰越可爾享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville I was born about 1120, in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom as the son of Osmund de Stuteville. He married Agnes about 1154, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. In 1170, his occupation is listed as sheriff of northumberland. He died in 1202, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

fr.Cottingham, Yorkshire, England: Cottingham, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville I est né environ 1120, à Burton Agnes, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Osmund de Stuteville. Il a épousé Agnes environ 1154, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. En 1170, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of northumberland. Il est décédé en 1202, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville I wurde um 1120 in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Osmund de Stuteville geboren. Er hat um 1154 in England Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1170 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of northumberland aufgeführt. Er starb 1202 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville I è nato il circa 1120 nel Burton Agnes, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Osmund de Stuteville. Lui sposato Agnes circa 1154, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1170, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of northumberland. Morì nel 1202, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville Iは約1120年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングブルトン アグネスでOsmund de Stutevilleの息子として生まれた。約1154年にイギリスでAgnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1170年，職業はsheriff of northumberlandと記録されている。彼は1202年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで83歳で死去した。

ko.Cottingham, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 컷잉함
ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville I(은)는 대략 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 버턴 애그니스에서 Osmund de Stuteville의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1154년 영국에서 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1170년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of northumberland이었다. 그는 1202년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville I nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Burton Agnes, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Osmund de Stuteville. Ele casou-se com Agnes aproximadamente 1154, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1170, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of northumberland. Ele faleceu em 1202, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos.

ru.Cottingham, Yorkshire, England: коттингхам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville I родился около 1120 г. в местности буртон агнесь, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Osmund de Stuteville. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes около 1154 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1170 году он работал по профессии sheriff of northumberland. Он умер в 1202 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Roger de Stuteville I nació aproximadamente 1120, en Burton Agnes, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Osmund de Stuteville. Se casó con Agnes aproximadamente 1154, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1170, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of northumberland. Murió en 1202, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años.
